About Our Founder

Aniefiok Ntuk

CEO

Aniefiok E. Ntuk is an Innovative, accomplished, result-oriented Professional,
Engineer, Investment Banking Consultant, Corporate / Project Finance Advisory Expert and also a Successful Businessman and Top Manager with over 27 work experiences include President/CEO of several companies In Poland and abroad. Former/Presently President/ CEO of the following companies:

1) Aniemax Capital Ltd. Katowice, Poland
A finance and Investment House
2) CEO/ Owner/Founder of Aniemax & Partners Energy Finance Consulting Poland,
A Corporate and Project Finance Advisory Company, since 1998,
3) Asset Management and Capital Services Company, Uyo, NIGERIA
4) MCCA CO West Africa Ltd, Abuja, Nigeria An International Project development
and management services firm.

A Polish trained Professional of Nigerian origin with 27 years experience in top management with excellent communication and team leadership skills with proven ability to operate at the highest level with minimal supervision. Significant contacts in financial services and Energy/power Industries both locally and Internationally. Aniefiok E. Ntuk is holding dual citizens of both Nigeria and Polish respectively. He holds MSC in energy engineering from Silesian Technical University, Gliwice in Poland and MBA of International Business School, at SGH Warsaw, Poland; Doctorate ( PhD ) in Investment Banking of The University of Economy in Poznan, Poland. Permanently resident in Poland since 1979 and citizen of Polish from June 2000

What Our Clients Say

Testimonials

Emily Thompson

"Aniemax Capital has been an absolute lifesaver for our business. Their innovative strategies and expert advice have truly transformed our financial landscape. I wholeheartedly recommend their services to any company looking to thrive in today's competitive market."

Jack Harrison

"The team at Aniemax Capital went above and beyond to help us restructure our debt portfolio. Their professionalism and personalized approach made the process smooth and efficient. I have complete confidence in their ability to deliver results and would recommend them without hesitation."

Olivia Bennett

"I was struggling to manage my invoices and recover overdue payments until I found Aniemax Capital. Their invoice management services have been a game-changer for my business. Their dedication and expertise have helped me streamline my finances and improve cash flow. I couldn't be happier with the results."

Liam Parker

"Aniemax Capital provided exceptional support with their loan portfolio services. Their team guided me through the evaluation and sale of my loan portfolio, maximizing its value. Their transparent communication and efficient execution made the entire process seamless. I highly recommend their services to anyone seeking financial solutions."

Work with us!

Learn More From

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of financial services does Aniemax Capital offer?

Aniemax Capital offers a wide range of financial services tailored to meet the diverse needs of our clients. These include debt management and collections, investment banking services, loan portfolio services, invoice management, wholesale purchase from banks, and distressed asset management.

How does Aniemax Capital ensure confidentiality and security for its clients?

At Aniemax Capital, we take client confidentiality and security very seriously. We adhere to strict data protection protocols and implement state-of-the-art security measures to safeguard our clients’ information. Our team is trained to handle sensitive data with the utmost care and discretion, ensuring complete confidentiality at all times.

What sets Aniemax Capital apart from other financial institutions?

What sets Aniemax Capital apart is our commitment to innovation, personalized service, and proven track record of success. We leverage our extensive experience and expertise to deliver tailored solutions that address the unique needs and challenges of each client. Our proactive approach, combined with our dedication to excellence, sets us apart as a trusted partner in financial management and growth.
